ddls:
CREATE TABLE "project_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome record */,
  "goal_range" TEXT /* Funding goal range of the projects (e.g., Less than 1000) */,
  "number_successful" INTEGER /* Number of projects that were successful within the goal range */,
  "number_failed" INTEGER /* Number of projects that failed within the goal range */,
  "number_canceled" INTEGER /* Number of projects that were canceled within the goal range */,
  "total_projects" INTEGER /* Total number of projects within the goal range */,
  "percentage_successful" REAL /* Percentage of successful projects within the goal range */,
  "percentage_failed" REAL /* Percentage of failed projects within the goal range */,
  "percentage_canceled" REAL /* Percentage of canceled projects within the goal range */,
  "reporting_period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "reporting_period_end" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_outcomes_goal_range FOREIGN KEY ("goal_range") REFERENCES goal_ranges ("goal_range_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "goal_range_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the goal range of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., successful, failed, canceled) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Initial budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department managing the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project owner */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of the project (e.g., software development, marketing campaign) */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of project completion */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual date of project completion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_goal_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_range_id") REFERENCES goal_ranges ("goal_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES project_owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goal_ranges" (
  "goal_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal range */,
  "goal_range_name" TEXT /* Name of the goal range (e.g., Less than 1000) */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the funding goal range */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the funding goal range */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the goal range */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the goal range record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the goal range record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the head of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the manager belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manager record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manager record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the owner belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the project owner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project owner record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project owner record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member assignment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member in the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the team member's involvement in the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the team member's involvement in the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team member assignment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team member assignment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_team_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the team member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the team member belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the team member */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the team member was hired */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team member record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team member record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "status_change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status change occurred */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the project */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the project */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who initiated the status change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status change record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status change record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_history_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the task */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., not started, in progress, completed) */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* User assigned to the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "estimated_hours" REAL /* Estimated hours for the task */,
  "actual_hours" REAL /* Actual hours spent on the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
